channel.title: Solopreneur on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Solopreneur on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: AI Tools for Solopreneurs in 2026
item.description: What Is the Best AI Tool for Solopreneurs in 2026? As a solopreneur, you wear many hats. You’re the CEO, marketing manager, and customer support specialist all rolled into one. But with great responsibility comes great stress, especially when it comes to managing tasks, leads, and clients. In 2026, AI tools are becoming increasingly essential for small business owners like yourself. So, what’s the best AI tool for solopreneurs in 2026?

item.title: How to Get More Traffic from Pinterest Without Spending Hours on Pins
item.description: If you’re a solopreneur or small business owner, you’ve probably heard that Pinterest can drive serious traffic to your website. But let’s be real: creating pins, figuring out what works, and staying consistent feels like a full-time job you didn’t sign up for. You’re already juggling a million tasks—spending hours designing graphics or researching keywords isn’t in the cards. So how do you make Pinterest work for you without it eating up your week?

item.title: How to Automate Your Solopreneur Business with AI Workflows
item.description: How to Automate Your Solopreneur Business with AI Workflows You’re a solopreneur, freelancer, or small business owner, and your to-do list is a mile long. You’re drowning in repetitive tasks—email follow-ups, content scheduling, customer inquiries—that eat up hours you could spend on growth or, frankly, just breathing. You’ve heard AI can help, but where do you even start? It feels like another thing to learn when you’re already stretched thin.
